GetActionRun.withLog: Whether to include execution logs for each sub-run in the detail response
GetActionRun.pageNo: Page number for sub-run records, default 1
GetActionRun.pageSize: Page size for sub-run records, default 10, max 100
GetActionRun.childRunState: Filter sub-run records by state. Enum: FAILED (execution failed), RUNNING (in progress), SUCCESS (execution completed)
